#+TITLE: GIK Missions Backend - API Documentation
#+AUTHOR: Auto-generated
#+DATE: 2026-07-14
#+OPTIONS: toc:3 num:t

* Overview

This document provides a comprehensive reference for all API endpoints in the GIK Missions Backend.

- *Base URL:* =http://127.0.0.1:9050=
- *API Prefix:* =/api/=
- *Docs:* =/api/docs= (Swagger UI)
- *Auth Method:* JWT Bearer Token (=Authorization: Bearer <token>=)

** Roles & Permission Levels

| Role       | Template Name        | Description                                      |
|------------+----------------------+--------------------------------------------------|
| Superuser  | superuser_template   | Full access to everything                        |
| Admin      | admin_template       | Full CRUD + user management + audit logs         |
| Staff      | staff_template       | Create/update most resources, upload souls       |
| Exec       | exec_template        | Read-only access to all resources + dashboards   |
| Missioner  | missioner_template   | Limited CRUD, restricted to own resources        |

** Authentication Flow

All protected endpoints require a valid JWT token in the =Authorization= header.
Tokens are obtained via =/api/auth/login= or =/api/auth/social=.
Token lifetime: 7 days (604800 seconds).

-----


* Authentication (=/api/auth/=)

** POST =/api/auth/login=
- *Description:* Email/password login
- *Auth Required:* No
- *Access:* Public

*** Request Body (JSON)
| Field    | Type     | Required | Description        |
|----------+----------+----------+--------------------|
| email    | EmailStr | Yes      | User email address |
| password | str      | Yes      | User password      |

*** Response (200)
| Field        | Type   | Description                |
|--------------+--------+----------------------------|
| access_token | str    | JWT access token           |
| token_type   | str    | "Bearer"                   |
| expires_in   | int    | Token lifetime in seconds  |
| user         | object | UserData object (see below)|

*** Error Responses
| Code | Description                |
|------+----------------------------|
|  401 | Invalid email or password  |
|  403 | User account is disabled   |

-----

** POST =/api/auth/manual_register=
- *Description:* Register a new missioner account
- *Auth Required:* No
- *Access:* Public
- *Content-Type:* =multipart/form-data=

*** Request Body (Form)
| Field              | Type          | Required | Description                     |
|--------------------+---------------+----------+---------------------------------|
| email              | EmailStr      | Yes      | User email                      |
| first_name         | str           | Yes      | First name                      |
| last_name          | str           | Yes      | Last name                       |
| password           | str           | Yes      | Password (min 8 chars - Django) |
| confirm_password   | str           | Yes      | Must match password             |
| preferred_username | str (optional)| No       | Display name                    |
| profile_photo      | File          | No       | Profile image upload            |

*** Response (200) - UserData
| Field         | Type      | Description              |
|---------------+-----------+--------------------------|
| id            | int       | User ID                  |
| email         | EmailStr  | User email               |
| first_name    | str       | First name               |
| last_name     | str       | Last name                |
| display_name  | str       | Preferred/display name   |
| roles         | list[str] | Role names               |
| is_superuser  | bool      | Superuser flag           |
| is_staff      | bool      | Staff flag               |
| profile_photo | str/null  | Photo URL                |

-----

** POST =/api/auth/social=
- *Description:* Social authentication (Google/Apple)
- *Auth Required:* No
- *Access:* Public

*** Request Body (JSON)
| Field    | Type        | Required | Description                         |
|----------+-------------+----------+-------------------------------------|
| provider | str         | Yes      | "google" or "apple"                 |
| token    | str (opt)   | No       | OAuth token                         |
| code     | str (opt)   | No       | Authorization code                  |
| user     | dict (opt)  | No       | Apple initial auth name data        |

*** Response (200) - SocialAuthResponse
| Field        | Type   | Description               |
|--------------+--------+---------------------------|
| access_token | str    | JWT access token          |
| token_type   | str    | "Bearer"                  |
| expires_in   | int    | Token lifetime in seconds |
| user         | object | UserData object           |
| is_new_user  | bool   | Whether newly registered  |

-----

** POST =/api/auth/refresh=
- *Description:* Refresh an access token
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Access:* Any authenticated user

*** Request Body (JSON)
| Field        | Type | Required | Description             |
|--------------+------+----------+-------------------------|
| access_token | str  | Yes      | Current access token    |

*** Response (200) - AuthResponse
Same as login response.

-----

** GET =/api/auth/verify=
- *Description:* Verify current token and get user info
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Access:* Any authenticated user

*** Response (200)
| Field | Type   | Description                     |
|-------+--------+---------------------------------|
| valid | bool   | Whether token is valid          |
| user  | object | UserData with roles (if valid)  |

-----

** GET =/api/auth/providers=
- *Description:* List available authentication providers
- *Auth Required:* No
- *Access:* Public

*** Response (200)
| Field     | Type | Description                    |
|-----------+------+--------------------------------|
| providers | list | List of AuthProviderInfo items |

Each provider item:
| Field                 | Type     | Description                 |
|-----------------------+----------+-----------------------------|
| name                  | str      | Provider identifier         |
| display_name          | str      | Human-readable name         |
| supports_registration | bool     | Allows new registrations    |
| auth_url              | str/null | OAuth authorization URL     |
| priority              | int      | Display priority            |

-----


* Users (=/api/users/=)

** GET =/api/users/=
- *Description:* List all users (paginated)
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =list_users=
- *Access:* Admin, Superuser

*** Query Parameters
| Field     | Type      | Required | Description          |
|-----------+-----------+----------+----------------------|
| page      | int (>0)  | No       | Page number (def: 1) |
| page_size | int (>0)  | No       | Items per page       |
| search    | str       | No       | Search by name/email |
| roles     | list[str] | No       | Filter by role names |
| is_active | bool      | No       | Filter active status |

*** Response (200) - Paginated
| Field     | Type | Description               |
|-----------+------+---------------------------|
| count     | int  | Total items               |
| page      | int  | Current page              |
| page_size | int  | Items per page            |
| last_page | int  | Total pages               |
| data      | list | List of UserData objects  |

-----

** POST =/api/users/create/=
- *Description:* Create a new user
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =add_user=
- *Access:* Admin, Superuser
- *Content-Type:* =multipart/form-data=

*** Request Body (Form)
| Field              | Type          | Required | Description                          |
|--------------------+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------|
| email              | str           | Yes      | User email                           |
| first_name         | str           | No       | First name                           |
| last_name          | str           | No       | Last name                            |
| password           | str           | Yes      | Password                             |
| profile_photo      | File          | No       | Profile image                        |
| preferred_username | str           | No       | Display name                         |
| role_id            | int           | No*      | Existing role ID to assign           |
| permissions        | list[str]     | No*      | Permissions for new role             |
| role_name          | str           | No*      | Name for new role (with permissions) |
| user_type          | enum          | No*      | admin/missioner/staff/exec           |

*Note:* One of =role_id=, =permissions + role_name=, or =user_type= must be provided.

*** Response (201) - UserData

-----

** GET =/api/users/{user_id}/=
- *Description:* Get user details
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =view_user=
- *Access:* Admin, Superuser, Staff, Exec; Missioners can only view own profile
- *Restriction:* Missioners restricted to own =user_id=

*** Response (200) - UserData

-----

** POST =/api/users/activate/{user_id}/=
- *Description:* Activate a user account
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =activate_user=
- *Access:* Admin, Superuser

*** Response (200) - UserData

-----

** POST =/api/users/deactivate/{user_id}/=
- *Description:* Deactivate a user account
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =deactivate_user=
- *Access:* Admin, Superuser

*** Response (200) - UserData

-----

** GET =/api/users/roles/=
- *Description:* List all roles (paginated)
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =list_roles=
- *Access:* Admin, Superuser, Exec

*** Query Parameters
| Field     | Type     | Required | Description          |
|-----------+----------+----------+----------------------|
| page      | int (>0) | No       | Page number          |
| page_size | int (>0) | No       | Items per page       |
| name      | str      | No       | Filter by role name  |

*** Response (200) - Paginated list of RoleSchema
| Field       | Type      | Description           |
|-------------+-----------+-----------------------|
| id          | int       | Role ID               |
| name        | str       | Role name             |
| description | str       | Role description      |
| permissions | list[str] | Permission strings    |
| created_at  | str       | ISO datetime          |
| updated_at  | str       | ISO datetime          |

-----

** POST =/api/users/roles/create/=
- *Description:* Create a new role
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =create_role=
- *Access:* Admin, Superuser

*** Request Body (JSON)
| Field       | Type      | Required | Description        |
|-------------+-----------+----------+--------------------|
| name        | str       | Yes      | Role name          |
| description | str       | No       | Role description   |
| permissions | list[str] | Yes      | Permission strings |

*** Response (200) - RoleOut

-----

** GET =/api/users/roles/{role_id}/=
- *Description:* Get role details
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =view_role=
- *Access:* Admin, Superuser, Exec, Missioner, Staff

*** Response (200) - RoleOut

-----

** GET =/api/users/permissions/=
- *Description:* List available permissions
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =list_permissions=
- *Access:* Admin, Superuser

*** Query Parameters
| Field     | Type | Required | Description                                  |
|-----------+------+----------+----------------------------------------------|
| user_type | enum | No       | Filter by role template (admin/missioner/etc)|

*** Response (200) - list[str]

* Missions (=/api/missions/=)

** Locations

*** GET =/api/missions/locations/=
- *Description:* List locations (paginated)
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =list_locations=
- *Access:* All roles (Missioner, Staff, Admin, Exec, Superuser)

**** Query Parameters
| Field              | Type     | Required | Description             |
|--------------------+----------+----------+-------------------------|
| page               | int (>0) | No       | Page number             |
| page_size          | int (>0) | No       | Items per page          |
| parent_location_id | int      | No       | Filter by parent        |
| category           | str      | No       | Filter by category      |
| search             | str      | No       | Search by name          |

**** Response (200) - Paginated list of LocationOutSchema
| Field                | Type     | Description             |
|----------------------+----------+-------------------------|
| id                   | int      | Location ID             |
| name                 | str      | Location name           |
| category             | str      | Location category       |
| description          | str      | Description             |
| parent_location_id   | int/null | Parent location ID      |
| parent_location_name | str/null | Parent location name    |
| created_at           | str      | ISO datetime            |
| updated_at           | str      | ISO datetime            |

-----

*** POST =/api/missions/locations/create/=
- *Description:* Create a new location
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =add_location=
- *Access:* Staff, Admin, Superuser

**** Request Body (JSON)
| Field              | Type | Required | Description        |
|--------------------+------+----------+--------------------|
| name               | str  | Yes      | Location name      |
| category           | str  | Yes      | Category           |
| description        | str  | No       | Description        |
| parent_location_id | int  | No       | Parent location ID |

**** Response (201) - LocationOutSchema

-----

*** PATCH =/api/missions/locations/{location_id}/update/=
- *Description:* Update a location
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =update_location=
- *Access:* Staff, Admin, Superuser

**** Request Body (JSON) - all fields optional
| Field              | Type | Required | Description        |
|--------------------+------+----------+--------------------|
| name               | str  | No       | Location name      |
| category           | str  | No       | Category           |
| description        | str  | No       | Description        |
| parent_location_id | int  | No       | Parent location ID |

**** Response (200) - LocationOutSchema

-----

*** GET =/api/missions/locations/{location_id}/=
- *Description:* Get location details
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =view_location=
- *Access:* All roles

**** Response (200) - LocationOutSchema

-----

*** DELETE =/api/missions/locations/{location_id}/delete/=
- *Description:* Delete a location
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =delete_location=
- *Access:* Admin, Superuser

**** Response (204) - "Location deleted successfully"

| page_size  | int (>0) | No       | Items per page            |
| search     | str      | No       | Search by name            |
| event_type | enum     | No       | "one_day" or "week_long"  |

**** Response (200) - Paginated list of MissionCategoryOutSchema
| Field       | Type     | Description       |
|-------------+----------+-------------------|
| id          | int      | Category ID       |
| name        | str      | Category name     |
| description | str      | Description       |
| event_type  | str/null | Event type        |
| created_at  | str      | ISO datetime      |
| updated_at  | str      | ISO datetime      |

| event_type  | enum | No       | "one_day" or "week_long" |

**** Response (201) - MissionCategoryOutSchema

-----

*** PATCH =/api/missions/categories/{category_id}/update/=
- *Description:* Update a mission category

- *Permission:* =update_mission_category=

- *Permission:* =view_mission_category=
- *Access:* All roles

**** Response (200) - MissionCategoryOutSchema

-----

*** DELETE =/api/missions/categories/{category_id}/delete/=
- *Description:* Delete a mission category
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =delete_mission_category=
- *Access:* Admin, Superuser

**** Response (204) - "Category deleted successfully"

** Missions (Core)

*** GET =/api/missions/=
- *Description:* List missions (paginated)
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =list_missions=
- *Access:* All roles

**** Query Parameters
| Field                         | Type     | Required | Description                         |
|-------------------------------+----------+----------+-------------------------------------|
| page                          | int (>0) | No       | Page number                         |
| page_size                     | int (>0) | No       | Items per page                      |
| category_id                   | int      | No       | Filter by category                  |
| location_id                   | int      | No       | Filter by location                  |
| status                        | enum     | No       | planning/active/completed/on_hold   |
| start_date_before             | str      | No       | YYYY-MM-DD                          |
| start_date_after              | str      | No       | YYYY-MM-DD                          |
| end_date_before               | str      | No       | YYYY-MM-DD                          |
| end_date_after                | str      | No       | YYYY-MM-DD                          |
| search                        | str      | No       | Search by title                     |
| registration_close_date_before| str      | No       | YYYY-MM-DD                          |
| registration_close_date_after | str      | No       | YYYY-MM-DD                          |

**** Response (200) - Paginated list of MissionOutSchema
| Field                     | Type      | Description                    |
|---------------------------+-----------+--------------------------------|
| id                        | int       | Mission ID                     |
| title                     | str       | Mission title                  |
| description               | str       | Description                    |
| category_id               | int/null  | Category ID                    |
| category_name             | str/null  | Category name                  |
| location_id               | int/null  | Location ID                    |
| location_name             | str/null  | Location name                  |
| start_date                | str       | Start date                     |
| end_date                  | str       | End date                       |
| status                    | enum      | Mission status                 |
| partnering_organization   | list[str] | Partner organizations          |
| event_type                | str/null  | Event type                     |
| registration_close_date   | date/null | Registration deadline          |
| registration_fee_required | bool/null | Whether fee required           |
| registration_fee          | Decimal   | Individual fee                 |
| couple_registration_fee   | Decimal   | Couple fee                     |
| is_registration_open      | bool/null | Registration status            |
| total_souls_won           | str/null  | Total souls count              |
| total_souls_followup      | str/null  | Follow-up souls count          |
| banner_image              | str/null  | Banner image URL               |
| created_at                | str       | ISO datetime                   |
| updated_at                | str       | ISO datetime                   |

-----

*** POST =/api/missions/create/=
- *Description:* Create a new mission
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =create_mission=
- *Access:* Staff, Admin, Superuser
- *Content-Type:* =multipart/form-data=

**** Request Body (Form)
| Field                     | Type      | Required | Description             |
|---------------------------+-----------+----------+-------------------------|
| title                     | str       | Yes      | Mission title           |
| description               | str       | Yes      | Description             |
| category_id               | int       | Yes      | Category ID             |
| location_id               | int       | No       | Location ID             |
| start_date                | date      | Yes      | Start date              |
| end_date                  | date      | Yes      | End date                |
| partnering_organization   | list[str] | No       | Partner organizations   |
| registration_close_date   | date      | No       | Registration deadline   |
| registration_fee_required | bool      | No       | Default: true           |
| registration_fee          | Decimal   | No       | Default: 0              |
| couple_registration_fee   | Decimal   | No       | Default: 0              |
| banner_image              | File      | No       | Banner image upload     |

**** Response (201) - MissionOutSchema

-----

*** PATCH =/api/missions/{mission_id}/update/=
- *Description:* Update a mission
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =update_mission=
- *Access:* Staff, Admin, Superuser
- *Content-Type:* =multipart/form-data=

**** Request Body (Form) - all fields optional
**** Response (200) - MissionOutSchema

-----

*** GET =/api/missions/{mission_id}/=
- *Description:* Get mission details
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =view_mission=
- *Access:* All roles

**** Response (200) - MissionOutSchema

-----

*** GET =/api/missions/{mission_id}/public/=
- *Description:* Get mission details (public-facing, minimal data)
- *Auth Required:* No
- *Access:* Public

**** Response (200) - MinimalMissionOutSchema
Same as MissionOutSchema but without =category_id=, =location_id=, =total_souls_followup=, =banner_image=.

-----

*** DELETE =/api/missions/{mission_id}/delete/=
- *Description:* Delete a mission
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =delete_mission=
- *Access:* Admin, Superuser

**** Response (204) - "Mission deleted successfully"

** Mission Participants (JIA)

*** GET =/api/missions/{mission_id}/participants/=
- *Description:* List participants for a mission (paginated)
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =list_jia_participants=
- *Access:* Staff, Admin, Superuser, Exec

**** Query Parameters
| Field              | Type     | Required | Description                                        |
|--------------------+----------+----------+----------------------------------------------------|
| page               | int (>0) | No       | Page number                                        |
| page_size          | int (>0) | No       | Items per page                                     |
| start_date         | str      | No       | YYYY-MM-DD                                         |
| end_date           | str      | No       | YYYY-MM-DD                                         |
| user_id            | int      | No       | Filter by user                                     |
| need_facilitation  | bool     | No       | Filter by facilitation need                        |
| gender             | enum     | No       | "male" or "female"                                 |
| sort_by            | enum     | No       | created_at/full_name/phone_number/travelling_from  |
| is_desc            | bool     | No       | Descending sort (default: true)                    |

**** Response (200) - Paginated list of MissionParticipantOutSchema
| Field               | Type          | Description              |
|---------------------+---------------+--------------------------|
| id                  | int           | Participant ID           |
| mission_id          | int/null      | Mission ID               |
| mission_title       | str/null      | Mission title            |
| user_id             | int/null      | Linked user ID           |
| full_name           | str           | Participant name         |
| phone_number        | str           | Phone number             |
| travelling_from     | str           | Origin location          |
| days_of_attendance  | list[object]  | [{day, day_date}]        |
| diet_advisory       | str/null      | Dietary requirements     |
| need_facilitation   | bool          | Needs facilitation       |
| facilitation_amount | Decimal/null  | Facilitation amount      |
| coming_as_couple    | bool/null     | Couple registration      |
| partner_name        | str/null      | Partner name             |
| gender              | str           | Gender                   |
| created_at          | str           | ISO datetime             |
| updated_at          | str           | ISO datetime             |

-----

*** POST =/api/missions/participants/create/=
- *Description:* Register a mission participant
- *Auth Required:* No
- *Access:* Public (registration form)

**** Request Body (JSON)
| Field               | Type         | Required | Description            |
|---------------------+--------------+----------+------------------------|
| mission_id          | int          | Yes      | Mission ID             |
| user_id             | int          | No       | Linked user ID         |
| full_name           | str          | No       | Participant name       |
| phone_number        | str          | No       | Phone number           |
| travelling_from     | str          | Yes      | Origin location        |
| days_of_attendance  | list[object] | Yes      | [{day, day_date}]      |
| diet_advisory       | str          | No       | Dietary requirements   |
| need_facilitation   | bool         | No       | Default: false         |
| facilitation_amount | Decimal      | No       | Default: 0             |
| gender              | enum         | Yes      | "male" or "female"     |
| coming_as_couple    | bool         | No       | Default: false         |
| partner_name        | str          | No       | Partner name           |

**** Response (201) - MissionParticipantOutSchema

-----

*** GET =/api/missions/participants/{participant_id}/=
- *Description:* Get participant details

- *Permission:* =view_jia_participant=
- *Access:* Staff, Admin, Superuser, Exec, Missioner

**** Response (200) - MissionParticipantOutSchema

-----

*** PATCH =/api/missions/participants/{participant_id}/update/=
- *Description:* Update a participant
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =update_jia_participant=
- *Access:* Staff, Admin, Superuser

** Mission Reports

*** GET =/api/missions/reports/=
- *Description:* List mission reports (paginated)
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =list_mission_reports=
- *Access:* Staff, Admin, Superuser, Exec

**** Query Parameters
| Field         | Type     | Required | Description                 |
|---------------+----------+----------+-----------------------------|
| page          | int (>0) | No       | Page number                 |
| page_size     | int (>0) | No       | Items per page              |
| mission_id    | int      | No       | Filter by mission           |
| created_by_id | int      | No       | Filter by author            |
| search        | str      | No       | Search by title/content     |
| start_date    | str      | No       | YYYY-MM-DD                  |
| end_date      | str      | No       | YYYY-MM-DD                  |
| sort_by       | enum     | No       | "created_at" or "title"     |
| is_desc       | bool     | No       | Descending (default: true)  |

**** Response (200) - Paginated list of ReportOutSchema
| Field           | Type     | Description        |
|-----------------+----------+--------------------|
| id              | int      | Report ID          |
| mission_id      | int/null | Mission ID         |
| mission_title   | str/null | Mission title      |
| title           | str      | Report title       |
| content         | str      | Report content     |
| report_file     | str/null | File URL           |
| created_by_id   | int/null | Author user ID     |
| created_by_name | str/null | Author name        |
| created_at      | str      | ISO datetime       |
| updated_at      | str      | ISO datetime       |

-----

*** POST =/api/missions/reports/create/=
- *Description:* Create a mission report
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =create_mission_report=
- *Access:* Staff, Admin, Superuser
- *Content-Type:* =multipart/form-data=

**** Request Body (Form)
| Field         | Type | Required | Description           |
|---------------+------+----------+-----------------------|
| mission_id    | int  | Yes      | Mission ID            |
| title         | str  | Yes      | Report title          |
| content       | str  | Yes      | Report content        |
| created_by_id | int  | Yes      | Author user ID        |
| report_file   | File | Yes      | Report file (upload)  |

**** Response (201) - ReportOutSchema

-----

*** GET =/api/missions/reports/{report_id}/=
- *Description:* Get report details
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Access:* Any authenticated user

**** Response (200) - ReportOutSchema

-----

*** PATCH =/api/missions/reports/{report_id}/update/=
- *Description:* Update a report
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =update_mission_report=
- *Access:* Staff, Admin, Superuser
- *Content-Type:* =multipart/form-data=

**** Request Body (Form) - all fields optional
**** Response (200) - ReportOutSchema

-----

*** DELETE =/api/missions/reports/{report_id}/delete/=
- *Description:* Delete a report
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =delete_mission_report=
- *Access:* Staff, Admin, Superuser

**** Response (204) - "Mission report deleted successfully"

-----

** Mission Gallery

*** GET =/api/missions/gallery/images/=
- *Description:* List gallery images (paginated)
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =list_photo_galleries=
- *Access:* All roles

**** Query Parameters
| Field          | Type     | Required | Description          |
|----------------+----------+----------+----------------------|
| page           | int (>0) | No       | Page number          |
| page_size      | int (>0) | No       | Items per page       |
| mission_id     | int      | No       | Filter by mission    |
| uploaded_by_id | int      | No       | Filter by uploader   |
| start_date     | str      | No       | YYYY-MM-DD           |
| end_date       | str      | No       | YYYY-MM-DD           |

**** Response (200) - Paginated list of MissionGalleryOutSchema
| Field            | Type     | Description          |
|------------------+----------+----------------------|
| id               | int      | Image ID             |
| mission_id       | int/null | Mission ID           |
| title            | str/null | Image title          |
| description      | str/null | Image description    |
| image            | str      | Image URL            |
| uploaded_by_id   | int/null | Uploader user ID     |
| uploaded_by_name | str/null | Uploader name        |
| created_at       | str      | ISO datetime         |
| updated_at       | str      | ISO datetime         |

-----

*** POST =/api/missions/gallery/images/create/=
- *Description:* Bulk upload gallery images with metadata
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =create_photo_gallery=
- *Access:* Staff, Admin, Superuser
- *Content-Type:* =multipart/form-data=

**** Request Body (Form)
| Field          | Type          | Required | Description                              |
|----------------+---------------+----------+------------------------------------------|
| mission_id     | int           | Yes      | Mission ID                               |
| uploaded_by_id | int           | Yes      | Uploader user ID                         |
| images         | File[] (multi)| Yes      | Image files                              |
| images_data    | str (JSON)    | Yes      | JSON array of {title, description} items |

*Note:* Number of metadata items must match number of uploaded files.

**** Response (201) - list of MissionGalleryOutSchema

-----

*** GET =/api/missions/gallery/images/{image_id}/=
- *Description:* Get gallery image details
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =view_photo_gallery=
- *Access:* All roles

**** Response (200) - MissionGalleryOutSchema

-----

*** DELETE =/api/missions/gallery/images/delete/=
- *Description:* Bulk delete gallery images
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =delete_photo_gallery=
- *Access:* Staff, Admin, Superuser

**** Request Body (JSON)
| Field      | Type      | Required | Description       |
|------------+-----------+----------+-------------------|
| mission_id | int       | Yes      | Mission ID        |
| image_ids  | list[int] | Yes      | IDs to delete     |

**** Response (204) - "{count} Images deleted successfully"

-----


** Mission Analytics

*** GET =/api/missions/analytics/overview/=
- *Description:* System-wide analytics report across all missions
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =view_admin_stats=
- *Access:* Admin, Superuser

**** Query Parameters
| Field | Type | Required | Description                          |
|-------+------+----------+--------------------------------------|
| year  | int  | No       | Target year (defaults to current year)|

**** Response (200)
#+begin_src json
{
  "year": 2026,
  "summary": {
    "this_month": { "total_souls": 2, "new_converts": 1, "follow_ups": 1, "age_group_breakdown": [...] },
    "last_3_months": { "total_souls": 5, "new_converts": 4, "follow_ups": 1, "age_group_breakdown": [...] },
    "last_6_months": { "total_souls": 9, "new_converts": 7, "follow_ups": 2, "age_group_breakdown": [...] },
    "last_8_months": { "total_souls": 11, "new_converts": 9, "follow_ups": 2, "age_group_breakdown": [...] },
    "this_year": { "total_souls": 11, "new_converts": 9, "follow_ups": 2, "age_group_breakdown": [...] }
  },
  "monthly_breakdown": [
    {
      "month": "2026-07",
      "total": 2,
      "new_converts": 1,
      "follow_ups": 1,
      "age_group_breakdown": [
        {"age_group": "0-12", "count": 0},
        {"age_group": "13-17", "count": 0},
        {"age_group": "18-24", "count": 0},
        {"age_group": "25-39", "count": 2},
        {"age_group": "40-59", "count": 0},
        {"age_group": "60+", "count": 0}
      ]
    }
  ],
  "missions_summary": {
    "total": 15,
    "active": 5,
    "completed": 8,
    "planning": 1,
    "on_hold": 1
  },
  "age_group_totals": [
    {"age_group": "0-12", "count": 0},
    {"age_group": "13-17", "count": 2},
    {"age_group": "18-24", "count": 3},
    {"age_group": "25-39", "count": 4},
    {"age_group": "40-59", "count": 1},
    {"age_group": "60+", "count": 1}
  ]
}
#+end_src

**** Response Fields
| Field              | Type   | Description                                              |
|--------------------+--------+----------------------------------------------------------|
| year               | int    | The year the report covers                               |
| summary            | object | Period-based totals (this_month, 3/6/8 months, year)     |
| monthly_breakdown  | list   | Per-month souls data with age group breakdowns           |
| missions_summary   | object | Mission counts by status                                 |
| age_group_totals   | list   | Overall age distribution for the year                    |

Each period in =summary= contains:
| Field               | Type | Description                            |
|---------------------+------+----------------------------------------|
| total_souls         | int  | Total souls won in the period          |
| new_converts        | int  | Souls with status "new_convert"        |
| follow_ups          | int  | Souls with status "follow_up"          |
| age_group_breakdown | list | [{age_group, count}] for each age band |

Age groups: =0-12=, =13-17=, =18-24=, =25-39=, =40-59=, =60+=

-----

*** GET =/api/missions/analytics/{mission_id}/=
- *Description:* Per-mission analytics report with daily breakdown
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =view_mission_report=
- *Access:* All roles (Missioner, Staff, Admin, Exec, Superuser)

**** Path Parameters
| Field      | Type | Description |
|------------+------+-------------|
| mission_id | int  | Mission ID  |

**** Response (200)
#+begin_src json
{
  "mission": {
    "id": 2,
    "title": "Kibera Slums Medical Outreach",
    "status": "active",
    "start_date": "2026-08-01",
    "end_date": "2026-08-07",
    "location": "Kibera Slums",
    "category": "Medical Mission",
    "duration_days": 7
  },
  "totals": {
    "total_souls": 3,
    "new_converts": 2,
    "follow_ups": 1,
    "active": 0
  },
  "daily_breakdown": [
    {
      "date": "2026-08-03",
      "total": 2,
      "new_converts": 1,
      "follow_ups": 1,
      "age_group_breakdown": [
        {"age_group": "0-12", "count": 0},
        {"age_group": "13-17", "count": 0},
        {"age_group": "18-24", "count": 1},
        {"age_group": "25-39", "count": 1},
        {"age_group": "40-59", "count": 0},
        {"age_group": "60+", "count": 0}
      ]
    }
  ],
  "age_group_breakdown": [
    {"age_group": "0-12", "count": 0},
    {"age_group": "13-17", "count": 0},
    {"age_group": "18-24", "count": 1},
    {"age_group": "25-39", "count": 0},
    {"age_group": "40-59", "count": 0},
    {"age_group": "60+", "count": 0}
  ],
  "gender_breakdown": [
    {"gender": "male", "count": 1},
    {"gender": "female", "count": 2}
  ]
}
#+end_src

**** Response Fields
| Field              | Type   | Description                                    |
|--------------------+--------+------------------------------------------------|
| mission            | object | Mission metadata (title, status, dates, etc.)  |
| totals             | object | Overall soul counts for the mission            |
| daily_breakdown    | list   | Per-day data with age group breakdowns         |
| age_group_breakdown| list   | Overall age distribution for this mission      |
| gender_breakdown   | list   | Male/female split of souls won                 |

Mission object fields:
| Field         | Type   | Description                     |
|---------------+--------+---------------------------------|
| id            | int    | Mission ID                      |
| title         | str    | Mission title                   |
| status        | str    | planning/active/completed/on_hold|
| start_date    | str    | YYYY-MM-DD                      |
| end_date      | str    | YYYY-MM-DD                      |
| location      | str    | Location name                   |
| category      | str    | Category name                   |
| duration_days | int    | Total days of the mission       |

-----

* Souls (=/api/souls/=)

** GET =/api/souls/=
- *Description:* List souls (paginated)
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =list_souls=
- *Access:* All roles (Missioners see own souls only)

*** Query Parameters
| Field          | Type     | Required | Description                                           |
|----------------+----------+----------+-------------------------------------------------------|
| page           | int (>0) | No       | Page number                                           |
| page_size      | int (>0) | No       | Items per page                                        |
| is_personal    | bool     | No       | Filter personal souls                                 |
| mission        | int      | No       | Filter by mission ID                                  |
| gender         | enum     | No       | Gender filter                                         |
| age_group      | enum     | No       | Age group filter                                      |
| location       | int      | No       | Filter by location ID                                 |
| status         | enum     | No       | new_convert / follow_up / baptized / etc.             |
| search         | str      | No       | Search by name/phone                                  |
| created_before | date     | No       | YYYY-MM-DD                                            |
| created_after  | date     | No       | YYYY-MM-DD                                            |
| user           | int      | No       | Filter by missioner                                   |
| sort_by        | enum     | No       | uploaded_at/first_name/phone_number/date_added        |
| is_desc        | bool     | No       | Descending (default: true)                            |

*** Response (200) - Paginated list of SoulOut
| Field          | Type     | Description          |
|----------------+----------+----------------------|
| id             | int      | Soul ID              |
| first_name     | str      | First name           |
| last_name      | str      | Last name            |
| phone_number   | str      | Phone number         |
| gender         | str      | Gender               |
| age_group      | str      | Age group            |
| location_id    | int/null | Location ID          |
| location_name  | str/null | Location name        |
| status         | str      | Soul status          |
| date_added     | date     | Date added           |
| mission_id     | int/null | Mission ID           |
| mission_title  | str/null | Mission title        |
| is_personal    | bool     | Personal soul flag   |
| user_id        | int/null | Missioner user ID    |
| user_full_name | str/null | Missioner name       |
| soul_full_name | str      | Full name            |
| description    | str/null | Description          |
| created_at     | str      | ISO datetime         |
| updated_at     | str      | ISO datetime         |

-----

** GET =/api/souls/stats/=
- *Description:* Get souls statistics
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =souls_stats=
- *Access:* Missioner, Staff, Admin, Superuser

*** Query Parameters
Same as souls list query parameters.

*** Response (200) - dict (stats summary)

-----

** POST =/api/souls/create/=
- *Description:* Create a new soul
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =create_soul=
- *Access:* Missioner, Staff, Admin, Superuser

*** Request Body (JSON)
| Field        | Type     | Required | Description           |
|--------------+----------+----------+-----------------------|
| first_name   | str      | Yes      | First name            |
| last_name    | str      | Yes      | Last name             |
| phone_number | str      | Yes      | Phone number          |
| gender       | enum     | Yes      | Gender type           |
| age_group    | enum     | Yes      | Age group category    |
| location     | int      | No       | Location ID           |
| status       | enum     | Yes      | Soul status           |
| date_added   | date     | No       | Date added            |
| mission      | int      | No       | Mission ID            |
| is_personal  | bool     | No       | Default: false        |
| user         | int      | No       | Missioner user ID     |
| description  | str      | No       | Description           |

*** Response (201) - SoulOut

-----

** POST =/api/souls/upload_souls/=
- *Description:* Bulk upload souls from Excel/CSV file
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =upload_souls=
- *Access:* Staff, Admin, Superuser
- *Content-Type:* =multipart/form-data=

*** Request Body (Form)
| Field       | Type | Required | Description             |
|-------------+------+----------+-------------------------|
| mission_id  | int  | Yes      | Mission ID              |
| location_id | int  | Yes      | Location ID             |
| file        | File | Yes      | Excel/CSV file          |

Expected file columns: missioner_email, first_name, last_name, phone_number, gender, age_group, description, date_added

*** Response (200) - dict (upload result summary)

-----

** PATCH =/api/souls/{soul_id}/update/=
- *Description:* Update a soul
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =update_soul=
- *Access:* Missioner (own), Staff, Admin, Superuser

*** Request Body (JSON) - all fields optional
*** Response (200) - SoulOut

-----

** DELETE =/api/souls/{soul_id}/delete/=
- *Description:* Delete a soul
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =delete_soul=
- *Access:* Admin, Superuser

*** Response (200) - SoulOut

-----

** GET =/api/souls/{soul_id}/=
- *Description:* Get soul details (with progress updates)
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =view_soul=
- *Access:* All roles; Missioners restricted to own souls
- *Restriction:* =missioner_template= restricted via handler

*** Response (200) - SoulDetailsOut
Extends SoulOut with:
| Field                   | Type        | Description                     |
|-------------------------+-------------+---------------------------------|
| latest_progress_update  | object/null | Most recent progress update     |
| initial_progress_update | object/null | Earliest progress update        |

-----

** Progress Updates

*** GET =/api/souls/progress_updates/=
- *Description:* List progress updates (paginated)
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =list_progress_updates=
- *Access:* All roles

**** Query Parameters
| Field     | Type     | Required | Description               |
|-----------+----------+----------+---------------------------|
| page      | int (>0) | No       | Page number               |
| page_size | int (>0) | No       | Items per page            |
| soul_id   | int      | No       | Filter by soul            |
| is_desc   | bool     | No       | Descending (default: true)|

**** Response (200) - Paginated list of ProgressUpdateOut
| Field          | Type   | Description          |
|----------------+--------+----------------------|
| id             | int    | Update ID            |
| soul_id        | int    | Soul ID              |
| content        | str    | Update content       |
| update_date    | date   | Update date          |
| soul_full_name | str    | Soul full name       |
| created_at     | str    | ISO datetime         |
| updated_at     | str    | ISO datetime         |

-----

*** POST =/api/souls/progress_updates/create/=
- *Description:* Create a progress update
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =create_progress_update=
- *Access:* All roles; Missioners restricted to own souls
- *Restriction:* =missioner_template= restricted via handler

**** Request Body (JSON)
| Field       | Type | Required | Description        |
|-------------+------+----------+--------------------|
| soul_id     | int  | Yes      | Soul ID            |
| content     | str  | Yes      | Update content     |
| update_date | date | No       | Date of update     |

**** Response (201) - ProgressUpdateOut

-----

*** GET =/api/souls/progress_updates/{progress_update_id}/=
- *Description:* Get progress update details
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =view_progress_update=
- *Access:* All roles; Missioners restricted to own souls

**** Response (200) - ProgressUpdateOut

-----

*** PATCH =/api/souls/progress_updates/{progress_update_id}/update/=
- *Description:* Update a progress update
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =update_progress_update=
- *Access:* All roles; Missioners restricted to own souls

**** Request Body (JSON)
| Field       | Type | Required | Description        |
|-------------+------+----------+--------------------|
| soul_id     | int  | Yes      | Soul ID            |
| content     | str  | Yes      | Update content     |
| update_date | date | No       | Date of update     |

**** Response (200) - ProgressUpdateOut

-----

*** DELETE =/api/souls/progress_updates/{progress_update_id}/delete/=
- *Description:* Delete a progress update
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =delete_progress_update=
- *Access:* Missioner (own), Staff, Admin, Superuser

**** Response (200) - ProgressUpdateOut

* Testimonies & Miracles (=/api/testimonies/=)

** Testimonies

*** GET =/api/testimonies/=
- *Description:* List testimonies (paginated)
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =list_testimonies=
- *Access:* All roles

**** Query Parameters
| Field          | Type     | Required | Description               |
|----------------+----------+----------+---------------------------|
| page           | int (>0) | No       | Page number               |
| page_size      | int (>0) | No       | Items per page            |
| soul_id        | int      | No       | Filter by soul            |
| user_id        | int      | No       | Filter by user            |
| mission_id     | int      | No       | Filter by mission         |
| created_before | date     | No       | YYYY-MM-DD                |
| created_after  | date     | No       | YYYY-MM-DD                |
| is_selected    | bool     | No       | Filter by selection status|
| search         | str      | No       | Search title/content      |

**** Response (200) - Paginated list of TestimonyOutSchema
| Field          | Type     | Description           |
|----------------+----------+-----------------------|
| id             | int      | Testimony ID          |
| title          | str      | Title                 |
| content        | str      | Content               |
| soul_id        | int/null | Soul ID               |
| soul_full_name | str/null | Soul name             |
| user_id        | int/null | User ID               |
| user_full_name | str/null | User name             |
| mission_id     | int/null | Mission ID            |
| mission_title  | str/null | Mission title         |
| photo_url      | str/null | Photo URL             |
| is_selected    | bool     | Selected for publish  |
| created_at     | str      | ISO datetime          |
| updated_at     | str      | ISO datetime          |

-----

*** POST =/api/testimonies/create/=
- *Description:* Create a testimony
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =create_testimony=
- *Access:* Missioner, Staff, Admin, Superuser
- *Content-Type:* =multipart/form-data=

**** Request Body (Form)
| Field      | Type | Required | Description    |
|------------+------+----------+----------------|
| title      | str  | Yes      | Title          |
| content    | str  | Yes      | Content        |
| soul_id    | int  | No       | Soul ID        |
| user_id    | int  | No       | User ID        |
| mission_id | int  | No       | Mission ID     |
| photo      | File | No       | Photo upload   |

**** Response (201) - TestimonyOutSchema

-----

*** GET =/api/testimonies/{testimony_id}/=
- *Description:* Get testimony details
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =view_testimony=
- *Access:* All roles

**** Response (200) - TestimonyOutSchema

-----

*** PATCH =/api/testimonies/{testimony_id}/update/=
- *Description:* Update a testimony
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =update_testimony=
- *Access:* Missioner (own, restricted), Staff, Admin, Superuser
- *Restriction:* =missioner_template= restricted via handler
- *Content-Type:* =multipart/form-data=

**** Request Body (Form) - all fields optional
Additional field: =is_selected= (bool) for staff+

**** Response (200) - TestimonyOutSchema

-----

*** DELETE =/api/testimonies/{testimony_id}/delete/=
- *Description:* Delete a testimony
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =delete_testimony=
- *Access:* Staff, Admin, Superuser

**** Response (204) - "Testimony deleted successfully"

- *Description:* Update a miracle
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =update_miracle=
- *Access:* Missioner (own, restricted), Staff, Admin, Superuser
- *Restriction:* =missioner_template= restricted via handler
- *Content-Type:* =multipart/form-data=

* Audit Logs (=/api/audit_logs/=)

** GET =/api/audit_logs/=
- *Description:* List audit log entries (paginated)
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =list_auditlogs=
- *Access:* Admin, Exec, Superuser

*** Query Parameters
| Field           | Type     | Required | Description                                            |
|-----------------+----------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------|
| page            | int (>0) | No       | Page number                                            |
| page_size       | int (>0) | No       | Items per page                                         |
| user_id         | int      | No       | Filter by user                                         |
| action_type     | enum     | No       | login/logout/creation/modification/deletion/reports    |
| action_category | enum     | No       | authentication/souls/locations/mission_categories/     |
|                 |          |          | missions/users/reports                                 |
| is_successful   | bool     | No       | Filter by success                                      |
| flag_suspicious | bool     | No       | Filter flagged entries                                 |
| ip_address      | str      | No       | Filter by IP                                           |

*** Response (200) - Paginated list of AuditLogSchema
| Field              | Type   | Description              |
|--------------------+--------+--------------------------|
| id                 | int    | Log entry ID             |
| user_id            | int    | User who performed action|
| action_type        | str    | Type of action           |
| action_category    | str    | Category of action       |
| action_description | str    | Human-readable description|
| is_successful      | bool   | Whether action succeeded |
| ip_address         | str    | User IP address          |
| flag_suspicious    | bool   | Flagged as suspicious    |
| created_at         | str    | ISO datetime             |
| updated_at         | str    | ISO datetime             |

-----

** GET =/api/audit_logs/{id}/=
- *Description:* Get audit log details
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =view_auditlog=
- *Access:* Admin, Exec, Superuser

*** Response (200) - AuditLogSchema

-----

** POST =/api/audit_logs/{id}/flag_suspicious/=
- *Description:* Flag an audit log entry as suspicious
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =flag_suspicious_auditlog=
- *Access:* Admin, Superuser

*** Response (200) - AuditLogSchema

-----

** POST =/api/audit_logs/{id}/unflag_suspicious/=
- *Description:* Remove suspicious flag from an audit log entry
- *Auth Required:* Yes (JWT)
- *Permission:* =unflag_suspicious_auditlog=
- *Access:* Admin, Superuser

*** Response (200) - AuditLogSchema

-----

* Health Check

** GET =/health/=
- *Description:* Application health check (used by Docker healthcheck)
- *Auth Required:* No
- *Access:* Public

*** Response (200)
#+begin_src json
{"status": "ok"}
#+end_src

-----

** GET =/api/health/=
- *Description:* API health check
- *Auth Required:* No
- *Access:* Public

*** Response (200)
#+begin_src json
{"status": "ok"}
#+end_src

-----

update_mission_report, delete_mission_report,

create_miracle, list_miracles, view_miracle, update_miracle, delete_miracle,
create_testimony, list_testimonies, view_testimony, update_testimony, delete_testimony,
create_photo_gallery, list_photo_galleries, view_photo_gallery,
update_photo_gallery, delete_photo_gallery,
create_progress_update, view_progress_update, list_progress_updates,
update_progress_update, delete_progress_update,
view_auditlog, list_auditlogs,
view_missioner_stats, view_admin_stats, soul_stats,
list_permissions,
create_jia_participant, view_jia_participant, list_jia_participants,
update_jia_participant, delete_jia_participant,
view_exec_dashboard

** Permissions by Role

*** Missioner
#+begin_example
view_location, list_locations, list_missions, view_mission,
view_mission_category, list_mission_categories, view_mission_report,
view_user, update_user (own only), view_role,
create_soul, update_soul, view_soul, list_souls (own only),
list_miracles, create_miracle, view_miracle,
create_testimony, list_testimonies, view_testimony, update_testimony,
view_photo_gallery, list_photo_galleries,
create_progress_update, list_progress_updates, update_progress_update,
view_progress_update, delete_progress_update,
view_missioner_stats, view_jia_participant, soul_stats
#+end_example

*** Staff (includes all Missioner permissions +)
#+begin_example
create_location, update_location,
create_mission, update_mission,
create_mission_category, update_mission_category,
create_mission_report, update_mission_report, delete_mission_report,
update_soul, update_miracle, delete_miracle,
update_testimony, delete_testimony,
create_photo_gallery, update_photo_gallery, delete_photo_gallery,
update_progress_update,
create_jia_participant, update_jia_participant, view_jia_participant,
list_jia_participants, delete_jia_participant,
upload_souls
#+end_example

*** Admin (includes all Staff permissions +)
#+begin_example
view_user, list_users, add_user, update_user, delete_user,
view_role, add_role, update_role, delete_role,
view_auditlog, list_auditlogs,
delete_soul, delete_mission, delete_mission_category, delete_location,
view_admin_stats, view_missioner_stats,
list_permissions, delete_jia_participant,
flag_log_suspicious, unflag_log_suspicious
#+end_example

*** Exec (read-only across all resources)
#+begin_example
view_user, list_users, view_role, list_roles,
view_location, list_locations,
view_mission, list_missions,
view_mission_category, list_mission_categories,
view_mission_report, list_mission_reports,
view_soul, list_souls,
view_miracle, list_miracles,
view_testimony, list_testimonies,
view_photo_gallery, list_photo_galleries,
view_progress_update, list_progress_updates,
view_auditlog, list_auditlogs,
view_missioner_stats, view_exec_dashboard,
view_jia_participant, list_jia_participants
#+end_example

*** Superuser
All permissions (full access).

-----

* Appendix: Common Response Patterns

** Paginated Response Structure
#+begin_src json
{
  "count": 100,
  "page": 1,
  "page_size": 20,
  "last_page": 5,
  "data": [...]
}
#+end_src

** Error Response
#+begin_src json
{"detail": "Error message here"}
#+end_src

** Common HTTP Status Codes
| Code | Meaning                                    |
|------+--------------------------------------------|
|  200 | Success                                    |
|  201 | Created                                    |
|  204 | Deleted / No content                       |
|  400 | Validation error / Bad request             |
|  401 | Unauthenticated / Invalid credentials      |
|  403 | Permission denied / Account disabled       |
|  404 | Resource not found                         |
|  500 | Internal server error                      |

** Authentication Header Format
#+begin_example
Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs...
#+end_example
